steps.title: Focus on when
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize when Eli Ben-Ari won the A.M. Turing Award. The relevant note gives the year, so the best sentence must foreground 1996 rather than the award's prestige or his contribution.

steps.title: Reject other focuses
steps.content: A omits the year. B emphasizes the reason he won. C explains the award's purpose and does not mention him. The remaining choice places the year in the focus position of the sentence. The answer is D.
